<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Test\Constraint; use PHPUnit\Framework\Constraint\Constraint; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response; final class ResponseHasHeader extends Constraint { public function __construct( private string $headerName, ) { } public function toString(): string { return \sprintf('has header "%s"', $this->headerName); } /** * @param Response $response */ protected function matches($response): bool { return $response->headers->has($this->headerName); } /** * @param Response $response */ protected function failureDescription($response): string { return 'the Response '.$this->toString(); } }
